mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT s.*, ( 6371 * ACOS( COS(RADIANS(#{userLat})) * COS(RADIANS(s.latitude)) * COS(RADIANS(s.longitude) - RADIANS(#{userLng})) + SIN(RADIANS(#{userLat})) * SIN(RADIANS(s.latitude)) ) ) AS distance FROM store s
1=1
AND s.supports_delivery = TRUE AND s.latitude IS NOT NULL AND s.longitude IS NOT NULL AND s.latitude BETWEEN (#{userLat} - 0.05) AND (#{userLat} + 0.05) AND s.longitude BETWEEN (#{userLng} - 0.05) AND (#{userLng} + 0.05)
AND s.store_category = #{category}
AND ( s.store_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM store_menu m WHERE m.store_idx = s.store_idx AND m.menu_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) )
) t
WHERE t.distance <= (t.delivery_radius_m / 1000.0) ORDER BY t.distance ASC, t.created_at DESC
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE store SET store_name = #{storeName}, store_category = #{storeCategory}, store_description = #{storeDescription}, store_phone = #{storePhone}, minimum_order_amount = #{minimumOrderAmount}, store_address1 = #{storeAddress1}, store_address2 = #{storeAddress2}, supports_delivery = #{supportsDelivery}, supports_onsite = #{supportsOnsite}, store_status = #{storeStatus}, longitude = #{longitude}, latitude = #{latitude} WHERE store_idx = #{storeIdx} AND owner_member_idx = #{ownerMemberIdx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO store ( owner_member_idx, store_name, store_category, store_description, store_phone, minimum_order_amount, store_address1, store_address2, supports_delivery, supports_onsite, store_status, longitude, latitude ) VALUES ( #{ownerMemberIdx}, #{storeName}, #{storeCategory}, #{storeDescription}, #{storePhone}, #{minimumOrderAmount}, #{storeAddress1}, #{storeAddress2}, #{supportsDelivery}, #{supportsOnsite}, #{storeStatus}, #{longitude}, #{latitude} )
